summary: Verified all 5 requested bug fixes via code review and E2E testing: 1) POI panel extracted to independent section outside weather overlay div, 2) POI panel has touch event stopPropagation handlers, 3) POI panel positioned at left: 0.5rem, bottom: 1rem, z-index: 1900, 4) Compass rose hidden by default (showCompassRose: false in hudLayout.ts), 5) JSX structure integrity verified with proper closing tags.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6219 - Comment 'Route POIs extracted to independent section below' marks where POI was removed from weather div
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6237 - Comment 'Route POIs — Independent Panel (not tied to weather swipe)' marks new independent POI section
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 6246-6247 - POI panel has onTouchStart={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} and onTouchMove={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} handlers
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 6278-6279 - Inner scrollable POI list also has stopPropagation handlers
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 6239-6245 - POI panel positioned with left: '0.5rem', bottom: '1rem', z-index: 1900, transform: scale(autoScale('weatherPanel'))
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 6220-6223 - Weather overlay div properly closes with and before independent POI panel starts
VERIFIED: hudLayout.ts line 23 - showCompassRose: false is the default value
VERIFIED: E2E test - Compass rose element count is 0 (not rendered when showCompassRose: false)
VERIFIED: E2E test - Weather overlay visible on left side at position x=264
VERIFIED: E2E test - Map controls visible on right side of screen

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 bug fixes verified via code review and E2E testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified: 1) POI panel is now independent from weather swipe - extracted to its own absolutely-positioned container at lines 6237-6369 with touch event propagation stopped, 2) POI panel positioned at left: 0.5rem, bottom: 1rem, z-index: 1900, 3) Compass rose hidden by default (showCompassRose: false in hudLayout.ts line 23), 4) Weather overlay properly closes before POI panel starts (no JSX structure issues), 5) MapControls visible on right side. Guest login works. Tutorial can be skipped with SKIP button. POI panel only visible when there's an active route with POIs.

poi_panel_independence.details: POI panel extracted from weather overlay div to independent section at line 6237. Has onTouchStart and onTouchMove handlers with e.stopPropagation() at lines 6246-6247 and 6278-6279 to prevent touch events from bubbling to weather swipe handler.

poi_panel_positioning.details: POI panel positioned with left: '0.5rem', bottom: '1rem', z-index: 1900, and uses autoScale('weatherPanel') for responsive scaling (lines 6239-6245).

compass_rose_hidden_default.details: hudLayout.ts line 23: showCompassRose: false. E2E test confirmed compass rose element count is 0 (not rendered).

weather_overlay_visibility.details: Weather overlay visible on left side of navigation view. E2E test confirmed position x=264 (left side).

jsx_structure_integrity.details: Weather overlay div properly closes at lines 6220-6223 with and before independent POI panel starts at line 6237. No duplicate closing tags or orphaned JSX.

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live
